holdings.infoBox: REM is an equity ETF with a total of 37 individual holdings. The top holdings are Annaly Capital Management stock at N/A, AGNC Investment at N/A, Starwood Property Trust at N/A, Dynex Capital at N/A, and Rithm Capital at N/A.

overview.description: The iShares Mortgage Real Estate ETF (REM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the FTSE Nareit All Mortgage Capped index, a market-cap-weighted index of residential and commercial mortgage REITs. REM was launched on May 1, 2007 and is issued by BlackRock.
